title: The Immortal Jellyfish
description: Generational Benchmark V1 flagship. Dash explores Turritopsis dohrnii life-cycle reversal: medusa → cyst → polyp via transdifferentiation. Accurate caveats on predation/disease. Animation Studio standards: storyboard, living ocean FX, dynamic camera, no slideshow.
cta: Follow Dash Science for more ocean wonders
